title: Muddy Pigs
description: Adds Muddy Pigs inspired by Minecraft Earth.
body:
Inspired by the Muddy Pig from Minecraft Earth, pigs can now take a bath and come out muddy. After taking a dip in the new mud fluid (crafted by combining a water bucket and 8 dirt), pigs can coat themselves in a film of mud. After a while out of mud, the film of mud on the pig dries out. While the mud is wet, a tulip might sprout on the pigs' heads. The tulip will drop if the pig is sheared. Dried up pigs will occassionally try to pathfind back to mud. If a pig gets wet from water or rain, the mud will wash away. Russian translations courtesy of [256smash](https://github.com/256smash)
Ukranian translations courtesy of [StarmanMine142](https://modrinth.com/user/StarmanMine142)
